title: Sending Automated emails from your own domain
excerpt:
Hi all, 
I want to be able to send automated emails to specific addresses listed in columns, however it needs to be GDPR compliant so I would like be able to send these mails from a company Domain which is an exchange/Ke…

posts.author: Mitch-CHOrRD (Mitch )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I want to be able to send automated emails to specific addresses listed in columns, however it needs to be GDPR compliant so I would like be able to send these mails from a company Domain which is an exchange/Kerio server. Rather than using the Outlook/Gmail integrations already available.

Is this already a possibility ?

kind regards

Mitch

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Mitch-CHOrRD, welcome to the community, and thanks for posting!!

At the moment this isn’t a possibility through monday.com (we only offer the Outlook/Gmail integrations), but if email your host has an open API, then you could build an integration with monday.com. Let me know if you have any other questions!

posts.author: wygodny (Shlomo Wygodny)
posts.cookedHtml:
I also need this - and quite amazed that there is no Monday/Exchange integration.
Found this 3rd party -

Zapier

Does anyone have any experience with it?
